author: Alex S
subject: v2.3.0
body: # [2.3.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.3.0-beta.7...v2.3.0) (2017-11-30) ### Bug Fixes * **InstantSearch.dispose:** dont call of URLSync widget ([#2604](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2604)) ([3234b12](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/3234b12)) ### Features * **core:** provide information about stalled search to widgets ([#2569](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2569)) ([d104be1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/d104be1))
